title: arenaria querioides var. willkommii
intro: Arenaria querioides var. willkommii, also known as Alpine Sandwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Alpine Sandwort has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Alpine Sandwort is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
